title: DSP Integration
description: Describes a programmatic Digital-Out-of-Home (pDOOH) DSP integration through which buyers transact against Clear Channel Outdoor inventory.

url.description: Public URL of the DSP partner.

description.description: Short description of the DSP and the role it plays in the pDOOH supply chain.

biddingProtocol.description: Real-time-bidding protocol the DSP supports for the integration.

transactionTypes.description: Programmatic transaction types supported through this DSP.

supportedAdFormats.description: Creative formats accepted by the DSP for CCO inventory.

inventoryScope.description: Clear Channel inventory categories accessible through this DSP.

audienceTargeting.description: Audience targeting capabilities exposed through this DSP.

supportsRADAR.description: Whether the DSP supports targeting and measurement against Clear Channel's RADAR audience segments.

supportsThirdPartyData.description: Whether the DSP can ingest third-party audience data (e.g., LiveRamp, Comscore).

supportsContextual.description: Whether contextual targeting (weather, time-of-day, venue type, dayparting) is supported.

geographicCoverage.description: Geographic markets supported through this DSP integration.

items.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code or named market.

measurementPartners.description: Measurement and attribution partners that integrate with this DSP for CCO campaigns.
